tasks.subject: Task 1: provision_macos helper + unit tests
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add a `provision_macos <dir>` function to `install.sh` (above the test-lib guard) that ensures Homebrew is installed and runs `brew bundle install` of the committed Brewfile, with bundle failure non-fatal; cover its control flow with unit tests.

**Files:**
- Modify: `install.sh` (add `provision_macos` among helper functions, before the `DOTFILES_INSTALL_LIB` guard ~line 139)
- Modify: `tests/install_test.sh` (add `provision_macos` scenario block before the `Result:` summary ~line 136)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] `provision_macos` defined above the `DOTFILES_INSTALL_LIB` guard.
- [ ] When `brew` already on PATH: does NOT invoke the Homebrew installer (`curl`), and runs `brew bundle install` with `HOMEBREW_BUNDLE_FILE=<dir>/Brewfile` and `HOMEBREW_BUNDLE_NO_LOCK=1`.
- [ ] A failing `brew bundle install` is non-fatal: returns 0.
- [ ] `sh tests/install_test.sh` ends `ALL PASS`.

**Verify:** `sh tests/install_test.sh` -> `ALL PASS`

**Steps:** TDD per plan doc: add the two provision_macos test cases (PATH-shimmed fake brew/curl), run->fail, implement provision_macos (command -v brew skip; Apple-Silicon /opt/homebrew install via NONINTERACTIVE curl `< /dev/tty`; eval shellenv; `if ! HOMEBREW_BUNDLE_FILE=... HOMEBREW_BUNDLE_NO_LOCK=1 brew bundle install; then err; fi`), run->ALL PASS, `sh -n` both, commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["install.sh", "tests/install_test.sh"], "verifyCommand": "sh tests/install_test.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["provision_macos defined above lib guard", "brew-present: no curl, bundle install has HOMEBREW_BUNDLE_FILE+NO_LOCK", "bundle failure non-fatal (returns 0)", "sh tests/install_test.sh -> ALL PASS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Wire provision_macos into the install handoff
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Change the tail of `install.sh` so that on macOS with a usable terminal it provisions then hands off via `zup`; non-macOS and no-tty behavior unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: `install.sh` (final handoff block ~lines 196-207)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] macOS + `/dev/tty`: tail calls `provision_macos "$CONFIG_DIR"` then `exec zsh -ic zup </dev/tty`.
- [ ] non-macOS + `/dev/tty`: unchanged — `exec zsh -i </dev/tty`.
- [ ] no-tty: unchanged — prints the guidance.
- [ ] `zsh/.zshrc` NOT modified.
- [ ] `sh -n install.sh` parses; `sh tests/install_test.sh` still `ALL PASS`.

**Verify:** `sh -n install.sh && sh tests/install_test.sh` -> parses + `ALL PASS`

**Steps:** Replace the handoff block per plan doc (Darwin: provision_macos + `exec zsh -ic zup </dev/tty`; else `exec zsh -i </dev/tty`; no-tty print unchanged); confirm `.zshrc` untouched + `sh -n` + tests; commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["install.sh"], "verifyCommand": "sh -n install.sh && sh tests/install_test.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["macOS+tty: provision_macos then exec zsh -ic zup", "non-macOS+tty: exec zsh -i unchanged", "no-tty: guidance print unchanged", "zsh/.zshrc not modified", "sh -n parses, tests ALL PASS"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Mark plan complete + final verify
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Flip this plan's checkboxes, sync `.tasks.json`, run the full check suite, and commit the bookkeeping (final commit before PR).

**Files:**
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-09-install-fresh-provision.md`
- Modify: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-09-install-fresh-provision.md.tasks.json`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] Task 1-2 checkboxes checked; Task 1-2 statuses `completed` in `.tasks.json`.
- [ ] Full check suite passes.

**Verify:** `sh tests/install_test.sh && sh -n install.sh && echo DONE`

**Steps:** Run full re-verification (tests ALL PASS, `sh -n` both, only expected files changed main..HEAD, provision_macos count >=2, `.zshrc` untouched); check plan boxes + set Task 1-2 completed in `.tasks.json`; commit `docs(install): mark fresh-provision plan tasks complete (IT-8323)`.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-09-install-fresh-provision.md", "docs/superpowers/plans/2026-06-09-install-fresh-provision.md.tasks.json"], "verifyCommand": "sh tests/install_test.sh && sh -n install.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["plan boxes checked", ".tasks.json Tasks 1-2 completed", "tests ALL PASS + sh -n parses + zshrc untouched"]}
```
